verdict.summary: Cluster red or yellow due to unassigned shards. Disk full, node left, or allocation filtering misconfigured.

dead_ends.why_fails: Force allocation of stale primary shards risks losing acknowledged writes and creating split-brain data

dead_ends.action: Restart all nodes simultaneously to fix red cluster
dead_ends.why_fails: Simultaneous restart causes full cluster outage and risks data loss if quorum is lost

workarounds.action: Check allocation explain API for root cause
workarounds.how: GET _cluster/allocation/explain?pretty  # shows exactly why shard is unassigned

workarounds.action: Free disk space below watermark thresholds
workarounds.how: Default watermarks: low=85%, high=90%, flood=95%. Free disk or adjust cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark settings

workarounds.action: Reroute with retry_failed to reattempt allocation after fixing root cause
